translation.literal_translation: And (there is no contradiction) regarding space and the rest as causes/effects, because the teaching is as stated. (14)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.14: despite differences in the ordering of entities like akasa across texts, scriptural teaching consistently states the same Brahman as cause; therefore no doctrinal contradiction follows.
translation.interpretive_note: Sutra compression of the invariant-cause / variant-sequence principle.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Literal keeps aphoristic ambiguity and may be smoothed later.
Technical line intentionally foregrounds the causal invariance argument.
